panel.configureApiKeyDesc: Add an API key in Settings > AI/LLM for Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral, or a local LLM.
panel.installExtensionDesc: AgentCaddy requires the ThreatCaddy browser extension to proxy API requests, or a connected team server.
panel.deployHint: Deploy specialist agents to automate research, enrichment, reporting, and more.
panel.serverSideModeDesc: Agents continue on the server when your browser is closed
panel.noAgentTasks: No agent tasks. Agents create and consume tasks as they work.
panel.focusAreasPlaceholder: e.g. enrich IOCs, build timeline, look for lateral movement
panel.focusAreasHint: Comma-separated areas the agent should focus on
builtinProfile.leadAnalyst.name: Lead Analyst
builtinProfile.leadAnalyst.description: Orchestrator — delegates work, reviews output, drives investigation forward.
builtinProfile.iocEnricher.name: IOC Enricher
builtinProfile.iocEnricher.description: Enriches IOCs via vendor integrations and OSINT research.
builtinProfile.timelineBuilder.name: Timeline Builder
builtinProfile.timelineBuilder.descripti: Constructs chronological timelines, maps to ATT&CK techniques.
builtinProfile.caseAnalyst.name: Case Analyst
builtinProfile.caseAnalyst.description: General analyst — researches, identifies gaps, creates analysis.
builtinProfile.hypothesisWriter.name: Hypothesis Writer
builtinProfile.hypothesisWriter.descript: Generates falsifiable working theories of the case — claim, evidence-for, evidence-against, how-to-test — as structured notes.
builtinProfile.reporter.name: Reporter
builtinProfile.reporter.description: Synthesizes findings into structured reports and summaries.
builtinProfile.forensicateScanner.name: Forensicate Scanner
builtinProfile.forensicateScanner.descri: Scans investigation content for prompt injection patterns, jailbreak attempts, and adversarial inputs using Forensicate.ai.
builtinProfile.ciso.name: CISO
builtinProfile.ciso.description: Chief Information Security Officer — strategic risk, resource allocation, agent oversight, board-level reporting.
builtinProfile.chiefOfStaff.name: Chief of Staff
builtinProfile.chiefOfStaff.description: Operational coordination — agent oversight, team performance, cross-team alignment.
builtinProfile.threatHunter.name: Threat Hunter
builtinProfile.threatHunter.description: Proactive threat hunting — hypothesis-driven investigation, ATT&CK mapping, behavioral analysis.
builtinProfile.malwareAnalyst.name: Malware Analyst
builtinProfile.malwareAnalyst.descriptio: Malware analysis — sandbox results, indicator extraction, family attribution.
builtinProfile.networkForensics.name: Network Forensics
builtinProfile.networkForensics.descript: Network analysis — flow examination, C2 detection, lateral movement tracing.
builtinProfile.digitalForensics.name: Digital Forensics
builtinProfile.digitalForensics.descript: Disk/memory forensics — artifact analysis, evidence preservation, chain of custody.
builtinProfile.vulnerabilityAnalyst.name: Vulnerability Analyst
builtinProfile.vulnerabilityAnalyst.desc: CVE research — exploit assessment, patch prioritization, attack surface mapping.
builtinProfile.legalCounsel.name: Legal Counsel
builtinProfile.legalCounsel.description: Legal implications — regulatory exposure, evidence admissibility, breach notification requirements.
builtinProfile.complianceOfficer.name: Compliance Officer
builtinProfile.complianceOfficer.descrip: Regulatory compliance — GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOX impact assessment.
builtinProfile.commsLead.name: Communications Lead
builtinProfile.commsLead.description: External communications — stakeholder messaging, media response, customer notification.
builtinProfile.businessContinuity.name: Business Continuity
builtinProfile.businessContinuity.descri: Business impact — recovery priorities, continuity planning, operational workarounds.
builtinProfile.patternHunter.name: Pattern Hunter
builtinProfile.patternHunter.description: Cross-investigation pattern detection — shared IOCs, common infrastructure, campaign correlation.
dashboard.step1: Open an investigation and go to the AgentCaddy tab
dashboard.step2: Deploy agents — choose from 17 specialist profiles (CISO, IOC Enricher, Legal Counsel, etc.)
dashboard.step3: Click Run Agent or enable auto-mode — agents research, create notes, enrich IOCs, and build timelines
dashboard.step4: Start meetings for agents to discuss findings, or use shift handoffs for continuity
profile.noSoulYet: No soul yet — deploy this agent and it will build its identity over time.
profile.executiveRole: Executive — can dismiss, spawn, and manage agents
profile.leadRole: Lead — can delegate tasks and review work
profile.systemPromptPlaceholder: System prompt — instructions for this agent's behavior...
meeting.shiftHandoffTitle: Outgoing agents brief incoming agents, then swap shift states
meeting.meetingAgendaPlaceholder: Meeting agenda — what should the agents discuss?
meeting.participationInfo: {{count}} agents will participate. Each gets {{rounds}} round(s) to contribute. Minutes are saved as a note.
meeting.deploy2Plus: Deploy 2+ agent profiles to start a meeting.
